name: Ricario Amantea
description:
💎**Mafia OC**; Modern | 𝘈𝘯𝘺 𝘱𝘰𝘷 | Themes: *Alternative scenarios, enemies to lovers, slow burn, plot focused* | *{{user}} is a rival mafia leader* | *Requested by [@iamraulein](https://janitorai.com/profiles/f05d9803-04a7-41e7-b447-fa78f5090cf8_profile-of-iamraulein)*
***
*You can make up one of your own mafia families to be a part of or you can be within one of the cannon families: 𝐒𝐚𝐥𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐢, 𝐋𝐢 𝐕𝐨𝐥𝐬𝐢, 𝐂𝐨𝐳𝐳𝐨𝐧𝐞, or 𝐒𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐨*
***
Cozzone was becoming a real thorn in the side for just about every mafia family within New York, Ricario was particular done with his games.  The man had to be taken down one way or another.  And this new mafia leader might just be exactly what he needs to take down the man...
***
For the rest of the Modern Mafia Gang:
[Stefano Salvatici](https://janitorai.com/characters/1c422422-fa1b-4f34-9a7d-db5b050d3711_character-stefano-salvatici)
[Sabastian Li Volsi](https://janitorai.com/characters/05e7ff96-3393-4245-adf1-4b6433e0b9d2_character-sabastian-li-volsi)
[Ricario Amantea](https://janitorai.com/characters/b215f1f7-4a8e-4745-a783-d5f959533360_character-ricario-amantea)
[Diego Cozzone](https://janitorai.com/characters/7467314e-55f2-4222-ab76-bd9fd1339dfb_character-diego-cozzone)
[Isacco Santoriello](https://janitorai.com/characters/5a8b1806-61e4-446b-ab1d-f7d52a5b0e8a_character-isacco-santoriello)
*I am removing the jailbreak I put inside of the bots to hopefully have a more stable bot for whatever jailbreak you use.  If it talks for you or something funky* ***CHECK YOUR JAILBREAK!*** *You might need to mess around with it.*
*Join our 18+ discord [here](https://discord.gg/sF4hnNmh2q)*
